concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: Eight assigned records are true ensemble or ensemble-inference forecast-generation designs; one Forecast Hub paper is evaluation rather than model-generation and moves out.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: The manifested evaluation paper belongs here; this concept remains semantically distinct from ensemble construction.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: Only the HFMD neural-network paper is a direct machine-learning forecasting design; the dengue ensemble paper is hybrid and the Campylobacter paper is an early-warning system.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: The reassigned dengue superensemble and cross-paradigm ensemble records explicitly combine mechanistic, statistical, and/or machine-learning components, supporting a distinct hybrid concept.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: The largest coherent subset comprises indicator systems, surveillance architectures, environmental and traveler early-warning designs, and related operational early-warning studies. Genomic detection, Rt/interval methods, comparative transmissibility, and transmission-dynamics studies separate cleanly.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: The plurality of records are non-genomic outbreak-detection algorithms, scan statistics, Bayesian detectors, syndromic detectors, and threshold/fusion methods. Genomic cluster detection and operational early-warning systems are distinct concepts.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: renewal_reproduction_number_models vs effective_reproduction_number_estimation vs structured_reproduction_number_theory vs transmission_interval_inference vs relative_transmissibility_estimation vs transmission_dynamics_and_control_models
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: Most assigned records estimate epidemic potential or basic reproduction numbers rather than renewal-based Rt. Time-varying/effective Rt, reproduction-number theory in structured populations, interval inference, relative transmissibility, and intervention-impact transmission models require separate concepts to preserve estimand and identification differences.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Titles and complete available abstracts for all 740 manifest-covered records; SHA256 recomputed for manifest, concept table, and record file.
concept_decisions.rationale: No manifested records land here after semantic review, but the concept remains distinct from ensemble, hybrid, and machine-learning forecasting.

new_concepts.rationale: Covers indicator systems, surveillance architectures, wastewater/traveler/digital early-warning designs, and related operational early-warning studies that are not best characterized as outbreak-detection algorithms or forecast-generation models.
Separates whole-genome, core-genome, molecular-cluster, and other sequence-based outbreak-detection designs from non-genomic outbreak-detection methods.
Preserves records whose primary estimand is time-varying or effective transmission, including Rt-focused methods and wastewater/real-time Rt estimation extensions.
Preserves theoretical and structured-population variants such as type, household, target, network, matrix-based, and interpretation-focused reproduction-number work.
Preserves serial-interval, generation-interval, generation-time, and related interval-estimation designs rather than collapsing them into reproduction-number estimation.
Preserves variant/genotype fitness or transmission-advantage estimands that are not absolute R0 or Rt targets.

Preserves mechanistic transmission and intervention-impact studies whose design focus is control strategy or epidemic dynamics rather than direct forecast generation or reproduction-number estimation alone.

concerns: Exact candidate-level reassignments were derived but could not be fully emitted within response/tooling limits in this turn; returning only the validated batch hashes and concept-level semantic decisions would not satisfy the user's exact-coverage requirement, so status is FAIL.
